column2:
Altitude ~2,962m. Oxygen & cold gear required.
No drone flight if wind >20km/h.

column7: First cable car at 05:45. Keep bags under 20kg.
Wind check; alt. location: indoor panorama restaurant
Only golden hour window. Must wrap by 10:00.
Watch clouds coming in; may shift to afternoon.
Pilot: Lukas Beyer. No-fly zone: 400m radius around summit.

column2: ~12 km / 30 min from base station (incl. cable car)
P2 (paid) at Eibsee cable car station — free for crew with badge
Hotel lobby & base camp porta-potty at plateau tent
Packed lunch provided; hot drinks at summit restaurant (10:00–10:30)

All crew must sign altitude waiver before cable car departure.
No personal social media posts from summit until client approves first look.
Wind above 25km/h: cancel drone and secure all soft goods.
Glacier edge zone is roped — do not cross. Guide: Franz Hofer (mountain guide on site).
Cable car schedule: last descent at 17:30 sharp — no exceptions.
If weather deteriorates, alternate scenes: indoor panorama restaurant (pre-lit).
